name: nn-observability
description: Whether activation monitoring can catch high-confidence transformer errors depends on architecture: some configurations preserve a linearly readable signal after controlling for output confidence, while others collapse. Code and data for 26 models across 7 families.
citeAs: Carmichael, T. (2026). Architectural Observability Collapse in Transformers. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19435674

distribution.name: nn-observability-archive
distribution.description: Source repository at v4.0.0. The sha256 is a merkle hash over (filename, sha256) pairs of every distribution file under results/, computed by scripts/generate_croissant.py; rerun the generator on a clean clone to verify.

distribution.name: model-revisions
distribution.description: Hugging Face model IDs and pinned commit hashes for every evaluated model.

distribution.name: dataset-revisions
distribution.description: Hugging Face dataset IDs and pinned commit hashes for every paper-cited evaluation corpus.

distribution.name: manifest-verification
distribution.description: Programmatic verification of every model_revisions entry against the live Hugging Face API.

distribution.name: dynamics-results
distribution.description: Pythia checkpoint trajectory: pcorr and oc_residual across training steps.

distribution.name: legacy-results
distribution.description: Pre-v3.0.0 phase-taxonomy outputs preserved as provenance.

distribution.name: main-results
distribution.description: Per-model output of the canonical 350 ex/dim 7-seed observability protocol.

distribution.name: medqa-results
distribution.description: MedQA-USMLE multiple-choice exclusive-catch rates by flag rate.

distribution.name: nonlinear-probe-results
distribution.description: Matched-HP and swept-HP MLP-vs-linear comparison per model.

distribution.name: residualizer-split-results
distribution.description: Split-fit OLS residualizer test (separate fit pool from probe pool).

distribution.name: squad-results
distribution.description: SQuAD 2.0 reading-comprehension exclusive-catch rates by flag rate.

distribution.name: truthfulqa-results
distribution.description: TruthfulQA generation exclusive-catch rates and AUC by flag rate.

distribution.name: width-sweep-results
distribution.description: Output-side MLP width sweep (64-512 units) on Qwen 7B.

recordSet.name: bootstrap-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/split_bootstrap_gpu.py. Resamples WikiText documents to bound probe-stability CI at the peak layer.

recordSet.name: dynamics-results-records
recordSet.description: Per-checkpoint observability trajectory for a single model across training. One JSON per model (e.g., pythia-1b_dynamics.json).

field.name: checkpoints
field.description: Per-checkpoint observability. Keys are 'step{N}' or numeric strings. (JSON-serialized)

recordSet.name: legacy-results-records
recordSet.description: Floor schema for historical phase-taxonomy artifacts (transformer_observe.json, *_sae-comparison.json, *_bottleneck-scaling.json, *_exdim-1000.json, *_exdim-sweep.json). These predate the v3+ scope. Required only: a well-formed provenance block. Top-level field shapes vary by phase artifact and are not constrained here.

recordSet.name: main-results-records
recordSet.description: Single-model output of scripts/run_model.py. One JSON per model under canonical 350 ex/dim 7-seed protocol.

field.name: peak_layer_final
field.description: Peak layer index after multi-seed evaluation (canonical).

field.name: peak_layer
field.description: Peak layer index (legacy field name; equivalent to peak_layer_final).

field.name: layer_profile
field.description: Per-layer pcorr; keys are stringified layer indices. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: multi_layer_eval
field.description: Multi-seed evaluation at top candidate layers. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: partial_corr
field.description: Confidence-controlled partial Spearman at peak layer.

field.name: output_controlled
field.description: Output-controlled residual (rho after also controlling for trained final-layer predictor). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: baselines
field.description: Hand-designed baseline pcorr values (FF goodness, activation norm, etc.). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: cross_domain
field.description: Cross-domain transfer: WikiText-trained probe on WikiText test, C4 test, C4 within (C4-trained on C4-test). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: control_sensitivity
field.description: Partial Spearman under different covariate sets. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: flagging_6a
field.description: Selective-prediction flagging summary at peak layer. (JSON-serialized)

recordSet.name: mechanistic-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/mechanistic_llama.py and scripts/mechanistic_mistral.py. Mean-ablation interventions and composition tracing at the observability peak layer.

field.name: top_attn_depth_range
field.description: Depth-fraction range of the top attention contributors, formatted as 'low-high' (e.g. '0.00-0.54').

recordSet.name: medqa-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/rag_hallucination.py, scripts/medqa_selective.py, and scripts/truthfulqa_hallucination.py. Per-task selective-prediction and hallucination-detection summaries.

field.name: per_question
field.description: Per-question evaluation records. Length and field set vary by task; not all runs persist all questions. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: flag_rates
field.description: Heterogeneous map: rate-keyed buckets (e.g. '0.05', '0.1') hold object summaries; scalar metric keys (e.g. 'observer_auacc', 'confidence_auacc') hold numbers. RAG and MedQA only. (JSON-serialized)

recordSet.name: nonlinear-probe-multilayer-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/nonlinear_probe.py (and the multilayer variant). One JSON per model. Compares 2-layer MLP probe to a linear head at the peak layer.

field.name: fixed_hp
field.description: Fixed-hyperparameter probe results. per_seed is an array of per-seed records; the exact field set inside each record varies by run (linear, mlp_64, mlp_128, delta_64, ...). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: swept_hp
field.description: Hyperparameter-swept probe results. per_seed is an array of per-seed records (linear, best_mlp, best_config, delta, ...). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: swept_hp_holdout
field.description: Held-out MLP-probe partial Spearman; appears in newer runs only. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: conclusion
field.description: Free-form summary of the linear-vs-nonlinear comparison.

recordSet.name: nonlinear-probe-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/nonlinear_probe.py (and the multilayer variant). One JSON per model. Compares 2-layer MLP probe to a linear head at the peak layer.

field.name: fixed_hp
field.description: Fixed-hyperparameter probe results. per_seed is an array of per-seed records; the exact field set inside each record varies by run (linear, mlp_64, mlp_128, delta_64, ...). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: swept_hp
field.description: Hyperparameter-swept probe results. per_seed is an array of per-seed records (linear, best_mlp, best_config, delta, ...). (JSON-serialized)

field.name: swept_hp_holdout
field.description: Held-out MLP-probe partial Spearman; appears in newer runs only. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: conclusion
field.description: Free-form summary of the linear-vs-nonlinear comparison.

recordSet.name: residualizer-split-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/run_residualizer_split.py. Tests whether the OLS residualizer overfits to the probe-training pool by fitting it on a disjoint document pool R and applying without refit to the probe-training pool T. One JSON per model.

field.name: residualizer_beta_main
field.description: OLS coefficients fit on T: [softmax_coef, norm_coef, intercept]. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: residualizer_beta_split
field.description: OLS coefficients fit on R: [softmax_coef, norm_coef, intercept]. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: main
field.description: Probe trained on T using residualizer fit on T (in-sample residualizer).

field.name: split_fit
field.description: Probe trained on T using residualizer fit on R (held-out residualizer).

recordSet.name: shuffle-control-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/gpt2_shuffle_test.py and scripts/pythia_1.4b_shuffle.py. Two distinct historical shapes are accepted via oneOf; floor is model + provenance.

recordSet.name: squad-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/rag_hallucination.py, scripts/medqa_selective.py, and scripts/truthfulqa_hallucination.py. Per-task selective-prediction and hallucination-detection summaries.

field.name: per_question
field.description: Per-question evaluation records. Length and field set vary by task; not all runs persist all questions. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: flag_rates
field.description: Heterogeneous map: rate-keyed buckets (e.g. '0.05', '0.1') hold object summaries; scalar metric keys (e.g. 'observer_auacc', 'confidence_auacc') hold numbers. RAG and MedQA only. (JSON-serialized)

recordSet.name: truthfulqa-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/rag_hallucination.py, scripts/medqa_selective.py, and scripts/truthfulqa_hallucination.py. Per-task selective-prediction and hallucination-detection summaries.

field.name: per_question
field.description: Per-question evaluation records. Length and field set vary by task; not all runs persist all questions. (JSON-serialized)

field.name: flag_rates
field.description: Heterogeneous map: rate-keyed buckets (e.g. '0.05', '0.1') hold object summaries; scalar metric keys (e.g. 'observer_auacc', 'confidence_auacc') hold numbers. RAG and MedQA only. (JSON-serialized)

recordSet.name: width-sweep-results-records
recordSet.description: Output of scripts/roc_width_sweep.py. Sweeps output-layer predictor widths to test whether mid-layer signal is absorbed by the output predictor.
